columns.name: Primary Care Physician (General Medicine, Family Medicine)
columns.reasoning: Exact variable S5 found with Answer_Options showing 1=Primary Care Physician (General Medicine, Family Medicine). Original expression S5=1 is a direct variable equality so S5 == 1 is used. Also identified hSpecialty (hidden) that consolidates specialty (1=PCP) and included as an alternative because some banner plans prefer hidden consolidated flags.
columns.userSummary: We used the survey question that asks specialty (the original S5 code) to select Primary Care Physicians. A hidden consolidated specialty flag is available as an alternative.

alternatives.userSummary: Uses the hidden consolidated specialty variable that classifies respondents as PCP (this is a broader hidden flag that maps to primary care).

uncertainties: Hidden variable hSpecialty encodes PCP as 1; confirm whether the banner intends to use the original S5 question or the hidden consolidated hSpecialty.
If the banner intent was to capture a broader PCP group that includes multiple S5 codes, verify that S5==1 is sufficiently inclusive.

columns.name: Pediatrician
columns.reasoning: Exact variable S5 found with Answer_Options showing 3=Pediatrician. Original expression S5=3 is a direct variable equality so S5 == 3 is used. Also found hSpecialty which codes 2=PED (consolidated hidden variable) and included it as an alternative in case the plan expects the hidden consolidated flag.
columns.userSummary: We matched 'Pediatrician' to the specialty question (the original S5 code). A hidden consolidated specialty flag is available as an alternative.

alternatives.userSummary: Uses the hidden consolidated specialty variable that classifies respondents as Pediatrician (this is a broader hidden flag that maps to pediatrics).

uncertainties: hSpecialty uses 2=PED while S5 uses 3=Pediatrician; confirm whether the banner intended the S5 original code or the consolidated hidden flag.
No evidence that 'Pediatrician' maps to any other S5 code, but verify that respondents coded '95=Other' for S5 were not intended to be included.
